description: A nighttime color photograph outside a house with porch lights on. Two officers in tactical vests, one lettered POLICE IMMIGRATION AND CUSTOMS ENFORCEMENT and one lettered POLICE, restrain a shirtless man whose hands are cuffed behind his back; a child-patterned blanket is draped over his shoulders. A watermark reads X/@SecMullinDHS.
notable_text: POLICE IMMIGRATION AND CUSTOMS ENFORCEMENT; POLICE
